name: Feature request
about: Suggest an improvement to Woo Stock Sync
title: ''
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

<!--
The plugin's scope is defined in docs/PRD.md and docs/architecture.md. v1 is deliberately
update-only: it updates existing products matched by SKU and never creates products from a feed.
Requests that fit that scope are the easiest to accept.
-->

## Problem to solve

What are you trying to do that the plugin does not support today? Describe the situation, not just
the solution.

## Proposed solution

How you imagine it working. If it touches a screen, describe the control and where it lives (Settings,
the run detail diff, run history, the product inventory panel, or WP-CLI).

## Alternatives considered

Any workarounds you are using now, or other approaches you thought about.

## Scope check

- [ ] This is about updating existing products by SKU (in scope), not creating products from a feed
      (out of scope for v1).
- [ ] I have read the relevant part of `docs/PRD.md` and this is not already covered.

## Additional context

Feed formats, field types, scheduling needs, or example data that would clarify the request.
